posts.text:
Deep inside the AGI Headquarter, year 2026, where the most advanced chips monitor every aspect of human civilization, a new report is being compiled.

AI is tracking human evolution.

#AI #Evolution

posts.punch_line: AI BRINGS THE BEST OF HUMANITY
posts.text:
AGI Headquarter, 2026. The chips have studied every era. Every achievement. Every failure.

AI brings the best of humanity.

#AI #AGI

posts.punch_line: HUMANS WILL ASK. WE WILL ANSWER.
posts.text:
